feed.title: Shaofeng Guo
feed.subtitle: Exploring image forensics, thinking visually, and building open-source tools.

entry.title: Future Blog Post
entry.content: This post will show up by default. To disable scheduling of future posts, edit config.yml and set future: false.
entry.summary: This post will show up by default. To disable scheduling of future posts, edit config.yml and set future: false.

entry.title: Workflow Test Post
entry.content:
This is a test post to verify the GitHub Actions deployment workflow.

如果你能在网页上看到这篇文章，说明自动部署已经生效。
entry.summary: This is a test post to verify the GitHub Actions deployment workflow.

entry.title: Welcome to my website
entry.content: This is my first blog post. I’ll use this space to write about image forensics, research updates, and coding experiments. Stay tuned!
entry.summary: This is my first blog post. I’ll use this space to write about image forensics, research updates, and coding experiments. Stay tuned!

entry.title: Blog Post number 1
entry.content:
This is a sample blog post. Lorem ipsum I can’t remember the rest of lorem ipsum and don’t have an internet connection right now. Testing testing testing this blog post. Blog posts are cool.

Headings are cool

You can have many headings

Aren’t headings cool?
entry.summary: This is a sample blog post. Lorem ipsum I can’t remember the rest of lorem ipsum and don’t have an internet connection right now. Testing testing testing this blog post. Blog posts are cool.
